name: Flexi-Rex
info: Flexi Rex: The Flexi Rex is a 3D-printed, poseable dinosaur model designed to move and bend without needing any assembly. Its body is made of connected segments that print in one piece, allowing it to wiggle, twist, and flex smoothly. The design usually features a friendly T-rex shape with rounded details, making it fun to hold, fidget with, or display. Flexi Rex models are popular because they’re quick to print, satisfyingly flexible, and show off what 3D printers can do with articulated designs.
